allow: Bash(awk 'NR==1245{print "\\t\\t/// <summary>释放所有相机SDK实例</summary>"; print "\\t\\tprivate void DisposeAllCameras\(\)"; print "\\t\\t{"; print "\\t\\t\\tvar cameras = new[] { camera1SDK, camera2SDK, camera3SDK, camera4SDK, camera5SDK, camera6SDK, camera7SDK, camera8SDK };"; print "\\t\\t\\tforeach \(var cam in cameras\)"; print "\\t\\t\\t{"; print "\\t\\t\\t\\tif \(cam == null\) continue;"; print "\\t\\t\\t\\ttry { cam.StopStreamGrabber\(\); } catch \(Exception ex\) { Logger.Error\($\\"相机StopStreamGrabber异常: {ex.Message}\\"\); }"; print "\\t\\t\\t\\ttry { cam.Close\(\); } catch \(Exception ex\) { Logger.Error\($\\"相机Close异常: {ex.Message}\\"\); }"; print "\\t\\t\\t}"; print "\\t\\t\\tLogger.Info\(\\"所有相机已释放\\"\);"; print "\\t\\t}"; print ""}1' VisionMeasure/From/MainFrm.cs)
